channel.title: Home on Lucid Void
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Lucid Void

item.title: Typography & Elements Test
item.description: This is a comprehensive test page to evaluate the typography, blockquotes, code blocks, and mathematical formulas in our new Metro-Material hybrid theme.

item.title: About
item.description:
Hello there! Here is Zhi-Fan/ʈʂɨ fæn/ (Charles) Dai/daɪ/. For convenience, you can just call me Zhi-Fan(/ʈʂɨ˥˩ fæn˧˥/), or my western name Charles directly.

Now I am a PhD researcher in the sNOm Laboratory, Politecnico di Milano, Italy. I mainly focused on the nonlinear optics.
